name: Grilled Portobello Mushrooms Over Angel Hair
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound fresh angel hair pasta, cooked al dente
1 3 ounce block St. John's Cheese, for shaving
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill.
2. Season each mushroom with olive oil and Essence of Emeril. Place on the grill and grill for 3-4 minutes on each side.
3. For the sauce: In a hot saute pan, add the heavy cream. When the cream starts to bubble and thicken, whisk in the grated St. John's Cheese. Season with minced garlic, salt, and pepper. Simmer the sauce for 2-3 minutes.
4. Cook the fresh angel hair pasta in boiling salted and oiled water for about 2 minutes, then drain. Add directly to the sauce.
5. Remove the grilled mushrooms and slice on the bias into 2-inch slices.
6. Using tongs, place three nests of pasta in the center of the platter.
7. Spoon the remaining sauce over the pasta and around the plate. Arrange the mushroom slices around the pasta.
8. Garnish with hand-shaved St. John's Cheese and chives.
Yield: 2 main course servings.
